## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, review recent posts, and plan next steps for GrowthX's AI-powered content creation workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent LinkedIn post performed well (43k views, 358 engagements) with minimal editing time (40 min total)](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Blog post content was effective but had some redundancy; future posts to focus on thought leadership/controversial topics](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Team to explore options for generating on-brand visuals for blog and social posts](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Workflow refinements needed: adjust tone/voice for LinkedIn, reduce emojis, incorporate written content sources](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)

## Topics

### Recent Content Performance

  - [LinkedIn post: 43k views, 358 engagements, 7 reposts](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Blog post: Received positive feedback from respected individuals](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Content tone: Controversial yet balanced, hitting key problems without going "off the rails"](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Time investment: \~15 min for blog post, \~25 min for LinkedIn post](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Focus on thought leadership and controversial topics](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Aim for punchy, engaging content with depth (avoid stretching too long)](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Explore advisory-focused content to explain Growth.li's services](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Next post: Follow up on marketing teams topic to maintain theme](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

### Visual Content Integration

  - [Explore options for consistent, branded visuals across posts](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Consider AI-generated images for blog headers](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [Investigate tools like SubMagic for creating short video content for social media](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Separate strategies needed for blog post images vs. social media visuals](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Fine-tune AI model with updated blog post and LinkedIn content](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [Adjust tone and reduce emojis in LinkedIn post generation](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Incorporate written content (memos, notes) as input for blog post creation](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Team to provide more detailed feedback on AI-generated content for continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Giulia to share written content for AI processing](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Team to provide feedback on next blog post draft](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Jenn to work on updating the AI model with recent content](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Explore visual generation options and provide instructions to Growth.li team](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Generate new LinkedIn post for "Why Most Marketing Teams Fail" using updated model](https://fathom.video/share/xadQ7RbBa93fWfidPkszVXSxi6pyDTGs?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
